description: SS Innovations International, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a commercial-stage surgical robotics company in India, Philippines, Indonesia, South America, Iraq, Cyprus, Oman, United Arab Emirates (UAE), Nepal, and internationally. It offers SSi Mantra, a surgical robotic system; and SSi Mudra, a range of stapling, energy, and core instrumentations for surgical systems. The company also develops NADI  Automated Coronary Anastomotic Connector, a micro stapling device; SSi Multi-Fire Clip Applier, a cartridge-based clip applicator; SSi Robotic Stapler; SSi Maya is an enabling
